assertions.title: Reject action terminates chain with reason

steps.action: As VP approver, reject request 69e2b2ba845e4f2f72c62462 with reason 'Budget constraints.'
steps.expected: Status becomes Rejected, chain terminates, submitter is notified.
steps.observed: Request moved to Rejected tab immediately and remained terminal; submitter saw Rejected count/item in Approvals.

evidence.network: POST /api/headcount-requests/69e2b2ba845e4f2f72c62462/reject -> 200; GET /api/headcount-requests/69e2b2ba845e4f2f72c62462 -> status=rejected, audit includes reject.

assertions.title: Request changes returns to submitter

steps.action: As VP approver, request changes on 69e2b2ba845e4f2f72c62468 with comment 'Please adjust salary.'
As submitter, edit and resubmit from the Changes Requested state.
steps.expected: Editable resubmit controls are available and resubmission restarts chain at step 1.
steps.observed: Only View actions were rendered for the submitter; no Edit & Resubmit control/dialog was available in list or detail.

evidence.network: POST /api/headcount-requests/69e2b2ba845e4f2f72c62468/request-changes -> 200; GET /api/headcount-requests/69e2b2ba845e4f2f72c62468 -> status=changes_requested; no UI path surfaced for POST /resubmit.

assertions.issues: Submitter resubmit/edit UX is not exposed in the real UI for this flow.

assertions.title: Notifications for approval events

steps.action: Advance request 69e2b2bb845e4f2f72c6246e through VP -> Finance -> CHRO.
steps.expected: Next approver gets notification; submitter gets event notifications (approval/rejection/changes) with real-time badge updates.
steps.observed: Next approver notifications worked via pulsing Approvals nav badge/count (Finance and CHRO saw count=1). Submitter saw status counters (Approved/Rejected/Changes Requested) but no dedicated bell/feed notification content UI.

evidence.network: POST /api/headcount-requests/69e2b2bb845e4f2f72c6246e/approve -> 200 at VP, Finance, CHRO; GET /api/headcount-requests/69e2b2bb845e4f2f72c6246e -> status=approved.

assertions.issues: Contract-specified notification bell/content surface was not present; only Approvals badge/status counters were available.

assertions.title: Full audit trail on completed request

steps.action: Open completed request 69e2b2bb845e4f2f72c6246e detail audit trail.
steps.expected: Chronological submission, each approval step with actor/time/action/comments, status changes, and edit history.
steps.observed: Chronological entries with actor names, timestamps, and approval comments were present (submit + VP + Finance + CHRO), but no edit-history events were present in the completed trail.

evidence.network: GET /api/headcount-requests/69e2b2bb845e4f2f72c6246e -> 200 with audit actions ['submit','approve','approve','approve'] and actor IDs resolved in UI.

assertions.issues: Completed request audit lacked edit-history entries required by the contract wording.

assertions.title: Self-approval prevention

steps.action: Inspect submitter-owned pending request 69e2b2bb845e4f2f72c62474 in Pending list.
steps.expected: Approve button is disabled with tooltip 'You cannot approve your own request.'
steps.observed: Row rendered as View-only action; expected disabled own-request approve control/tooltip was not rendered.

evidence.network: GET /api/headcount-requests/69e2b2bb845e4f2f72c62474 -> status=pending at step 0; UI did not surface expected self-approval disabled control.

assertions.issues: Required disabled approve button with tooltip is not present on submitter-owned pending request.

steps.action: Delete manager with 3 direct reports from Org Chart detail panel (Delete -> Confirm).
steps.expected: Manager is removed; reports are reassigned/top-level; manager dropdown excludes deleted manager; Spreadsheet manager references update.
steps.observed: Deleted manager disappeared from hierarchy, three reports remained and became top-level (managerId null), report manager dropdown no longer listed deleted manager, and Spreadsheet reflected post-delete roster.

evidence.network: DELETE /api/employees/69e2b2bc845e4f2f72c6247e (via UI) -> success; GET /api/scenarios/69e2b2b5845e4f2f72c62422/employees -> manager removed, each former report managerId=null.

frictions.description: Direct open to /approvals intermittently landed on /; navigation was stabilized by entering through the sidebar Approvals link after each login.
frictions.resolution: Used sidebar navigation to reach Approvals consistently before interacting.

summary: Tested 6 assertions: 2 passed (VAL-APPROVAL-008, VAL-CROSS-019) and 4 failed (VAL-APPROVAL-009, VAL-APPROVAL-010, VAL-APPROVAL-012, VAL-APPROVAL-013).
